target: 3 Bug Fixes - Full Test Audio, Multi-Answer Reading, Practice Listening Sets
summary: All 3 bug fixes verified: (1) Full Test Audio API returns 200 for ALL 4 parts across academic_set_a_01, academic_set_e_01, and general_set_a_01 - 12/12 tests passed. (2) isAnswerCorrect() handles multi-answer formats (fire/flame, A and B, etc). (3) Practice Listening now uses dedicated /api/question-bank/practice/listening-sets endpoint with pre-generated MP3 files at /api/static/audio/practice_listening/. 24/24 pytest tests passed.

bug_fixes_verified.description: Full Test Audio - All 4 parts play for all test sets
bug_fixes_verified.test_method: pytest - GET /api/full-test/audio/stream/{test_id}/listening/{part} returns 200 for parts 1-4 across academic_set_a_01, academic_set_e_01, general_set_a_01
bug_fixes_verified.code_location: /app/backend/routes/full_test_audio.py lines 101-129 - improved file matching for hash/non-hash filenames

bug_fixes_verified.test_method: Code review - onLoadedMetadata and onTimeUpdate handlers present in FullTestInterface.js lines 872-873

bug_fixes_verified.test_method: Code review - isAnswerCorrect() in PracticeMode.js handles slash, 'or', and 'and' separators
Playwright network intercept confirmed /api/question-bank/practice/listening-sets?count=3 is called (not /random)

bug_fixes_verified.test_method: pytest verified PL_S01_Q1.mp3, PL_S01_Q2.mp3 etc return 200 with audio/mpeg content-type

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All features verified via Playwright and code review)

seed_data_creation: N/A - Uses existing practice_listening_data.py (51 questions) and audio files
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified working. Full Test Audio uses improved file matching that handles both hash (listening_part1_abc123.mp3) and non-hash (listening_part1.mp3) filenames. Practice Listening calls /api/question-bank/practice/listening-sets endpoint which returns questions with audio_file paths pointing to /api/static/audio/practice_listening/*.mp3. isAnswerCorrect() handles multi-answer formats using regex splits on /, 'or', and 'and'.
